MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-07-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST RAMONA KOONTZY FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-07-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-22-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: YVONNE LEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
